---
title: "NCSS_boostrap_tuned_umap_05_14_2026"
format: html
---
```{r}
# =============================================================================
# NCSS_bootstrap_tuned_umap.R
#
# Re-runs the 10-replicate bootstrap using tuned UMAP+HDBSCAN settings
# from the sensitivity analysis. Plain variants are unaffected.
#
# Workflow:
#   1. Load tuned UMAP settings (best per outcome × engine from sensitivity)
#   2. For each outcome × umap_hdb variant × replicate:
#        - Use the tuned UMAP hyperparameters
#        - Run inner-CV tuning of downstream RF/XGB classifier (unchanged)
#        - Score on the held-out test split
#        - Save bundle
#   3. Pick canonical bundles (replicate closest to median kappa)
#
# Output: same structure as your existing bootstrap, with bundles named
#         "{outcome}_{engine}_umap_hdb_tuned" to distinguish from default UMAP.
# =============================================================================

library(tidyverse)
library(here)
library(beepr)

source(here("code", "modeling_functions_05_02_2026.R"))
source(here("code", "pedon_pack_functions_05_02_2026.R"))

dir.create(here("outputs", "models_05_02"),  showWarnings = FALSE, recursive = TRUE)
dir.create(here("outputs", "reports_05_02"), showWarnings = FALSE, recursive = TRUE)

# -----------------------------------------------------------------------------
# CONFIG
# -----------------------------------------------------------------------------
N_REPLICATES <- 10
INNER_V      <- 5
GRID_SIZE    <- 12

MIN_N_MAP <- c(
  taxorder        = 15,
  taxsuborder     = 15,
  taxgrtgroup     = 15,
  taxsubgrp_mod1  = 12,
  taxpartsize     = 20,
  taxonname_clean = 15
)

OUTCOMES <- c("taxorder", "taxsuborder", "taxgrtgroup",
              "taxsubgrp_mod1", "taxpartsize", "taxonname_clean")

# -----------------------------------------------------------------------------
# LOAD TUNED UMAP SETTINGS FROM SENSITIVITY ANALYSIS
# -----------------------------------------------------------------------------
# Combine part1 (great group + subgroup) and part2 (others)
sens_part1_path <- here("outputs", "reports_05_02",
                         "umap_sensitivity_results_part1_gg_subgrp.csv")
sens_part2_path <- here("outputs", "reports_05_02",
                         "umap_sensitivity_results_part2_others.csv")

if (file.exists(sens_part1_path) && file.exists(sens_part2_path)) {
  sens_full <- bind_rows(
    read.csv(sens_part1_path),
    read.csv(sens_part2_path)
  )
} else if (file.exists(here("outputs", "reports_05_02",
                             "umap_sensitivity_results_FULL.csv"))) {
  sens_full <- read.csv(here("outputs", "reports_05_02",
                              "umap_sensitivity_results_FULL.csv"))
} else if (file.exists(here("outputs", "reports_05_02",
                             "umap_sensitivity_results.csv"))) {
  sens_full <- read.csv(here("outputs", "reports_05_02",
                              "umap_sensitivity_results.csv"))
} else {
  stop("Cannot find sensitivity analysis results. ",
       "Expected one of: umap_sensitivity_results_FULL.csv, ",
       "umap_sensitivity_results_part1_gg_subgrp.csv + part2, ",
       "or umap_sensitivity_results.csv")
}

# Best UMAP config per (outcome × engine) by NCSS kappa
best_umap_settings <- sens_full %>%
  filter(status == "ok") %>%
  group_by(outcome, engine) %>%
  slice_max(ncss_kap, n = 1, with_ties = FALSE) %>%
  ungroup() %>%
  select(outcome, engine, n_neighbors, min_dist, minPts,
         tuned_ncss_kap = ncss_kap, tuned_perry_kap = perry_kap)

cat("\n========================================\n")
cat("BEST UMAP SETTINGS (loaded from sensitivity)\n")
cat("========================================\n")
print(best_umap_settings, n = Inf)

write.csv(best_umap_settings,
          here("outputs", "reports_05_02", "best_umap_settings.csv"),
          row.names = FALSE)

# Helper: look up tuned settings for a given outcome × engine
get_tuned_umap_settings <- function(outcome, engine,
                                     settings_df = best_umap_settings) {
  row <- settings_df %>%
    filter(outcome == !!outcome, engine == !!engine)

  if (nrow(row) == 0) {
    warning("No tuned settings found for ", outcome, " × ", engine,
            ". Falling back to defaults.")
    return(list(
      n_components = 10,
      n_neighbors  = 15,
      min_dist     = 0.1,
      metric       = "euclidean",
      minPts       = 10
    ))
  }

  list(
    n_components = 10,
    n_neighbors  = row$n_neighbors,
    min_dist     = row$min_dist,
    metric       = "euclidean",
    minPts       = row$minPts
  )
}

# -----------------------------------------------------------------------------
# LOAD DATA
# -----------------------------------------------------------------------------
ncss_pack_files <- list.files(here("outputs"),
                               pattern = "^pedon_pack_150_.*\\.csv$",
                               full.names = TRUE)
ncss_pack_path <- ncss_pack_files[which.max(file.mtime(ncss_pack_files))]
cat("Loading:", basename(ncss_pack_path), "\n")

pedon_pack_150 <- read.csv(ncss_pack_path) %>%
  mutate(peiid = as.character(peiid))

cat("Pedons loaded:", nrow(pedon_pack_150), "\n")

# -----------------------------------------------------------------------------
# PREP DATA PER OUTCOME
# -----------------------------------------------------------------------------
prepped_data <- map(OUTCOMES, function(oc) {
  df <- pedon_pack_150 %>%
    select(-any_of(setdiff(TAXONOMY_DROP_COLS, oc))) %>%
    prep_outcome(oc, min_n = MIN_N_MAP[[oc]])
  list(outcome = oc, df = df, n = nrow(df),
       n_class = nlevels(df[[oc]]))
}) %>% set_names(OUTCOMES)

cat("\n--- Modeling data per outcome ---\n")
walk(prepped_data, ~ cat(.x$outcome, ": n =", .x$n,
                          "| classes =", .x$n_class, "\n"))

# -----------------------------------------------------------------------------
# TUNED-UMAP BOOTSTRAP LOOP
# Only umap_hdb variants — plain bundles already exist and are unchanged.
# -----------------------------------------------------------------------------
TUNED_VARIANTS <- tribble(
  ~engine, ~space,
  "rf",    "umap_hdb",
  "xgb",   "umap_hdb"
)

cat("\n========================================\n")
cat("TUNED-UMAP BOOTSTRAP:", N_REPLICATES, "replicates × 2 engines × 6 outcomes\n")
cat("========================================\n")

all_test_metrics_tuned <- list()

for (rep in seq_len(N_REPLICATES)) {

  cat("\n>>> REPLICATE", rep, "of", N_REPLICATES, "\n")

  # Same seeding scheme as your original bootstrap
  set.seed(2026 + rep * 1000)
  splits_rep <- map(prepped_data, function(p) {
    s <- initial_split(p$df, prop = 0.8, strata = !!sym(p$outcome))
    list(train = training(s), test = testing(s))
  })

  metrics_this_rep <- list()

  for (oc in OUTCOMES) {
    s <- splits_rep[[oc]]

    for (i in seq_len(nrow(TUNED_VARIANTS))) {
      eng <- TUNED_VARIANTS$engine[i]
      sp  <- TUNED_VARIANTS$space[i]

      # Bundle name: "_tuned" suffix distinguishes from default-UMAP bundles
      bundle_name <- paste(oc, eng, sp, "tuned", sep = "_")
      rep_bundle_name <- paste0(bundle_name, "_rep", sprintf("%02d", rep))

      # Get tuned UMAP settings for this outcome × engine
      tuned_settings <- get_tuned_umap_settings(oc, eng)

      cat("  -- rep", rep, "|", bundle_name,
          "(nn=", tuned_settings$n_neighbors,
          " md=", tuned_settings$min_dist,
          " mpts=", tuned_settings$minPts, ") ...")
      t0 <- Sys.time()

      res <- tryCatch(
        fit_one_model(
          train_df = s$train %>% select(-any_of(setdiff(TAXONOMY_DROP_COLS, oc))),
          test_df  = s$test  %>% select(-any_of(setdiff(TAXONOMY_DROP_COLS, oc))),
          outcome  = oc, engine = eng, space = sp,
          inner_v  = INNER_V, grid_size = GRID_SIZE,
          seed     = 200 + i + rep * 1000,
          umap_settings = tuned_settings
        ),
        error = function(e) {
          cat(" ERROR:", e$message, "\n")
          NULL
        }
      )

      if (is.null(res)) next

      eval_metrics <- evaluate_predictions(
        res$pred, truth_col = oc,
        k_for_topk = if (oc == "taxonname_clean") 5 else 3
      ) %>%
        mutate(outcome = oc, engine = eng, space = sp,
               bundle_name = bundle_name, replicate = rep)

      metrics_this_rep[[bundle_name]] <- eval_metrics

      # Save UMAP fit alongside bundle
      umap_path <- paste0(here("outputs", "models_05_02"),
                          "/", rep_bundle_name, "_umap.uwot")
      uwot::save_uwot(res$umap_fit, file = umap_path)

      bundle <- build_umap_hdb_bundle(
        name = bundle_name, outcome = oc,
        train_raw = res$train_raw,
        prep_rec  = res$prep_rec,
        final_fit = res$final_fit,
        umap_model_file = umap_path,
        hdb_fit = res$hdb_fit, z_train = res$z_train,
        umap_settings = tuned_settings
      )

      bundle$test_metrics <- eval_metrics
      bundle$replicate <- rep
      bundle$tuned <- TRUE
      bundle$conf_mat <- conf_mat(
        res$pred %>% rename(.truth = all_of(oc)),
        truth = .truth, estimate = .pred_class
      )

      saveRDS(bundle,
              paste0(here("outputs", "models_05_02"),
                     "/", rep_bundle_name, "_bundle.rds"))

      dt <- round(as.numeric(difftime(Sys.time(), t0, units = "mins")), 1)
      cat(" done in", dt, "min | kap =", round(eval_metrics$kap, 3), "\n")
    }
  }

  all_test_metrics_tuned[[rep]] <- bind_rows(metrics_this_rep)
  beep("ping")
}

# Combine all metrics
test_metrics_tuned <- bind_rows(all_test_metrics_tuned)

write.csv(test_metrics_tuned,
          here("outputs", "reports_05_02",
               "test_metrics_all_reps_tuned_ncss.csv"),
          row.names = FALSE)

cat("\n========================================\n")
cat("BOOTSTRAP COMPLETE\n")
cat("========================================\n")

# -----------------------------------------------------------------------------
# SUMMARIZE + PICK CANONICAL TUNED BUNDLES (replicate closest to median kap)
# -----------------------------------------------------------------------------
test_metrics_tuned_summary <- test_metrics_tuned %>%
  group_by(outcome, engine, space, bundle_name) %>%
  summarise(
    n_replicates    = n(),
    kap_mean        = mean(kap,        na.rm = TRUE),
    kap_sd          = sd(kap,          na.rm = TRUE),
    kap_median      = median(kap,      na.rm = TRUE),
    kap_lo_95       = quantile(kap, 0.025, na.rm = TRUE),
    kap_hi_95       = quantile(kap, 0.975, na.rm = TRUE),
    accuracy_median = median(accuracy, na.rm = TRUE),
    bal_acc_median  = median(bal_accuracy, na.rm = TRUE),
    f_meas_median   = median(f_meas_macro, na.rm = TRUE),
    top_k_median    = median(top_k,    na.rm = TRUE),
    .groups = "drop"
  )

print(test_metrics_tuned_summary, n = Inf)

write.csv(test_metrics_tuned_summary,
          here("outputs", "reports_05_02",
               "test_metrics_summary_tuned_ncss.csv"),
          row.names = FALSE)

# Pick canonical replicate for each tuned bundle
canonical_picks_tuned <- test_metrics_tuned %>%
  left_join(
    test_metrics_tuned_summary %>% select(outcome, engine, space, kap_median),
    by = c("outcome", "engine", "space")
  ) %>%
  mutate(dist_to_median = abs(kap - kap_median)) %>%
  group_by(outcome, engine, space, bundle_name) %>%
  slice_min(dist_to_median, n = 1, with_ties = FALSE) %>%
  ungroup() %>%
  select(outcome, engine, space, bundle_name, replicate,
         kap, kap_median, dist_to_median)

cat("\n--- Canonical tuned bundle per outcome × engine ---\n")
print(canonical_picks_tuned)

write.csv(canonical_picks_tuned,
          here("outputs", "reports_05_02",
               "canonical_replicate_picks_tuned.csv"),
          row.names = FALSE)

# Copy canonical replicate's bundle to its canonical filename
cat("\nCopying canonical tuned bundles...\n")
for (i in seq_len(nrow(canonical_picks_tuned))) {
  pick <- canonical_picks_tuned[i, ]
  rep  <- pick$replicate
  bn   <- pick$bundle_name

  src_bundle <- paste0(here("outputs", "models_05_02"),
                       "/", bn, "_rep", sprintf("%02d", rep), "_bundle.rds")
  dst_bundle <- paste0(here("outputs", "models_05_02"),
                       "/", bn, "_bundle.rds")

  if (!file.exists(src_bundle)) {
    cat("  WARNING: missing", src_bundle, "\n")
    next
  }

  b <- readRDS(src_bundle)
  b$repeated_split_summary <- test_metrics_tuned_summary %>%
    filter(bundle_name == bn) %>%
    as.list()
  saveRDS(b, dst_bundle)

  src_umap <- paste0(here("outputs", "models_05_02"),
                     "/", bn, "_rep", sprintf("%02d", rep), "_umap.uwot")
  dst_umap <- paste0(here("outputs", "models_05_02"),
                     "/", bn, "_umap.uwot")
  if (file.exists(src_umap)) {
    file.copy(src_umap, dst_umap, overwrite = TRUE)
  }

  cat("  ", bn, "(rep", rep, ", kap =", round(pick$kap, 3), ")\n")
}

cat("\n========================================\n")
cat("DONE.\n")
cat("Tuned UMAP bundles saved to outputs/models_05_02/\n")
cat("- Canonical bundles: {outcome}_{engine}_umap_hdb_tuned_bundle.rds\n")
cat("- Replicate bundles: {outcome}_{engine}_umap_hdb_tuned_repNN_bundle.rds\n")
cat("- Summary CSV: test_metrics_summary_tuned_ncss.csv\n")
cat("========================================\n")
cat("\nNext step: re-run Perry_model_boostrap_05_12_2026.qmd to deploy\n")
cat("the new tuned bundles to Perry. The Perry script picks up all\n")
cat("bundles matching '*_bundle.rds' so tuned bundles will be included\n")
cat("automatically alongside plain and default-UMAP bundles.\n")

beep("complete")
```
